# Generated Files Registry
#
# One line per generated file in .aid/generated/. Format:
#   <output-path>|<build-command>
#
# - output-path: relative to the target project root (where .aid/ lives)
# - build-command: shell command to regenerate, run from the target project root
#
# Consumed by:
#   - /aid-discover FIX state (refresh-all at end of cycle per principles.md P3)
#   - verify-claims.sh (confirms each file was regenerated)
#
# Comments (lines starting with #) and blank lines are ignored.
# Order matters: scripts are executed top-to-bottom, so list dependencies first.
#
# PATH CONVENTION: build commands reference `canonical/scripts/...` paths. This
# works in the DOGFOOD repo (where canonical/ exists at root). In ADOPTER projects
# the scripts live under the install tree (`.claude/scripts/`, `.codex/scripts/`,
# `.cursor/scripts/`); aid-init or the skill orchestrator must resolve the actual
# script location at FIX-state refresh time. The registry FORMAT is canonical;
# the path resolver lives in the consuming skill.

# Project file inventory — read by discovery sub-agents as a pre-pass.
# Depends on: the entire project file tree.
.aid/generated/project-index.md|bash canonical/scripts/kb/build-project-index.sh --root . --output .aid/generated/project-index.md

# Numeric metrics (T3 facts) — line counts, file counts, term counts, severity tallies.
# Depends on: KB doc disk state + frontmatter contracts.
.aid/generated/metrics.md|bash canonical/scripts/kb/build-metrics.sh --root . --output .aid/generated/metrics.md

# KB index — agent-facing 2-3 line summary per KB doc, composed from frontmatter intent:.
# Depends on: every KB doc's frontmatter (changes to intent: fields).
# MUST run AFTER hand-edits to KB docs and BEFORE final commit.
.aid/generated/INDEX.md|bash canonical/scripts/kb/build-index.sh --root .aid/knowledge --output .aid/generated/INDEX.md
